audiences.name: Preventative & Family Wellness
audiences.description: Members actively engaged in proactive health management, pediatric care, and wellness-oriented lifestyle choices.

audiences.name: Chronic Care Intervention
audiences.description: Individuals requiring consistent monitoring and support for long-term conditions with varying levels of medication and appointment adherence.
key_characteristics: Ongoing management of chronic conditions like diabetes
Risk factors related to missed appointments or high lab results

audiences.name: Senior Health & Coverage Transitions
audiences.description: Mature members utilizing senior-specific benefits and individuals navigating major insurance eligibility changes.
key_characteristics: Active use of SilverSneakers or physical therapy
Medicare Advantage or COBRA inquiry activity
Focus on life-stage specific healthcare benefits

copy.headline: Wellness for the whole family, from first steps to every milestone.
copy.subhead: Healthco Complete Care provides proactive screenings and expert pediatric support for your family’s lifelong health.

copy.headline: Consistent support for your health journey.
copy.subhead: Healthco Complete Care helps you stay on track with medications and appointments.

copy.headline: Seamless Coverage for Life’s Transitions
copy.subhead: Experience peace of mind with senior-specific benefits designed to protect your health and your future.
